Removed unused import for java.awt.Color to clean up the code.
Removed unused import for java.awt.Robot to clean up the code.

Removed unused import for javax.swing.Timer to clean up the code.
Removed unused import for javax.swing.event.ListSelectionEvent to clean up the code.
Removed unused import for org.json.JSONObject to clean up the code.
Removed private fields related to timers, robot simulation, and list adjustment state that are no longer used in the simplified controller.
Simplified the constructor by removing the initialization of the Robot object and its associated exception handling.
Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.human_impl: Removed try-catch block for `new Robot()` in constructor.

Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Removed the `start()` method which handled program data preparation, UI setup, listener registration, and timer initialization.
Removed the `setupListeners()` method and all associated UI event binding logic for turns, floors, rooms, selling, inventory, and history views.
Removed numerous private methods handling inventory management, room state changes, selling logic, and UI updates that were part of the removed functionality.
Removed the inner `CheckBoxItemListener` class which was used to manage checkbox state interactions in the UI.
Replace complex UI state management and business logic delegation with a simple call to make the interface visible.

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.general_idea: The entire implementation of the MotelManagement class was removed, leaving only the package declaration and class signature.
Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.human_impl: Removed all fields, constructor, and methods from MotelManagement.java

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Tur.general_idea: The entire implementation of the Turn class was removed, leaving only the package declaration and class shell.
Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Tur.human_impl: Removed all fields, constructors, and methods from Turn.java

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Migrated the UI layout from the third-party MigLayout library to the standard Java Swing GroupLayout to remove external dependencies.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.human_impl: Replaced `new MigLayout(...)` with `new javax.swing.GroupLayout(...)` and associated constraint code.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Removed imports for the MigLayout library and associated Swing text utilities that are no longer used after the layout migration.
Removed the custom numeric document filter applied to the price text field, likely due to complexity or lack of necessity in the new design.
Added a new button for 6-hour bookings to the UI, expanding the booking options available to the user.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.human_impl: Added `booking6HoursButton` and its corresponding action listener placeholder.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Renamed the price text field variable from `priceTextField` to `jTextField1`, reflecting a change in the GUI builder's naming convention or state.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.human_impl: Changed variable declaration from `private JTextField priceTextField;` to `private javax.swing.JTextField jTextField1;`.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Updated the text on the room selling button to be more descriptive.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.human_impl: Changed button text from "VENTA HAB" to "VENTA A LA HABITACION".

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Updated the date label to reflect a specific date in 2024 instead of a generic placeholder.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.human_impl: Changed label text from "22 DICIEMBRE 2022" to "DICIEMBRE 2 2024".

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Removed public getter methods for UI components, likely because the new GUI builder pattern (NetBeans) manages component access differently or they are no longer needed externally.
Replaced the JFormDesigner creation comment with standard NetBeans template license and edit instructions.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.general_idea: Removed time and date labels from the view to simplify the interface.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.human_impl: Deleted initialization, layout constraints, and variable declarations for timeLabel and dateLabel.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.general_idea: Removed public getter methods for UI components to reduce exposure.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/User.human_impl: Deleted setFloorView(), setTurnSelectView(), setRoomView(), and other navigation setters.

Cleaned up imports that are no longer used after removing the view logic.
